description_long: This restaurant features a distinctive octagonal central structure with a green, multi-faceted roof and ornate wooden trim. The main building is surrounded by a wide, covered veranda supported by decorative white columns and balustrades, giving it a grand and inviting appearance. The entrance is accessed by a central staircase leading up to a portico with intricate woodwork and a triangular pediment. The upper section of the building includes small, arched windows and decorative gables, adding to its historic charm. The exterior is primarily constructed of wood, with visible weathering and a harmonious blend of green and natural wood tones. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and ornate architectural influences, making it a visually striking landmark in an urban setting.
description: A large, ornate wooden restaurant with a green octagonal roof, wraparound veranda, and decorative white columns. The facade features intricate woodwork and a grand central entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central staircase, main entrance, and the full width of the veranda with detailed columns and balustrades.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth of the veranda, the octagonal upper structure, and the layered green roofing.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the central staircase and veranda visible, but less detail on the entrance features.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again showing the depth of the veranda and the octagonal roof, with the central staircase visible.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is characterized by a wide, covered veranda with ornate white columns and balustrades, topped by a green, multi-faceted roof. Decorative woodwork adorns the portico and gables, while the natural wood siding and painted trim create a harmonious, historic appearance. The overall style is detailed and inviting, with a strong emphasis on craftsmanship and ornamentation.
